messages.content:
Anything you’d like to know about the event?

https://www.tpmevents.org/events/tpm-summit-2023

embeds.title: TPM Summit 2023 — TPM Events
embeds.description: Our first annual TPM Summit where leaders come together to share knowledge about our craft.

messages.content: what would be the entry fee for the summit?
What's the agenda?
I’m likely going to be virtual but in the chance I can travel, any recommendations for hotels nearby?

This week, we have finalized the cost structure for the conference and are excited to announce that registration will be opening tomorrow. We'll be offering early bird pricing specials, so stay tuned for more details.
The virtual attendance, indeed, will cost less than in-person. However, the in-person experience will have networking, Coaching Corner, and we are considering pop-up bookstore

The preliminary agenda is posted on the Eventbrite page: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/tpm-summit-2023-tickets-673547959077


It is based on TPM community-sourced presentation proposals

embeds.title: TPM Summit 2023
embeds.description: Join us at the TPM Summit 2023 for an epic in-person gathering on October 6, 2023, where we'll dive deep into all things TPM.

messages.content: We have a task to find partnerships with local hotels and transfers, but we didn't get  to it yet

tickets go on sale in the morning at 8 AM PT!

We have two events listed, depending on how you want to join.

In-Person Ticket Event: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/tpm-summit-2023-tickets-673547959077?aff=oddtdtcreator

Virtual Ticket Event: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/tpm-summit-2023-virtual-tickets-673576715087?aff=oddtdtcreator

embeds.title: TPM Summit 2023
embeds.description: Join us at the TPM Summit 2023 for an epic in-person gathering on October 6, 2023, where we'll dive deep into all things TPM.

embeds.title: TPM Summit 2023 - Virtual
embeds.description: Join us at the TPM Summit 2023 for an epic virtual gathering on October 6, 2023, where we'll dive deep into all things TPM.

messages.content: Looks great

So - you folks will know this first! 

Early Bird In-Person will be $175
Early Bird Virtual will be $125
Maybe we can cover the plan and do some promotion for the event in the next mothly TPM chat?
Let’s do that!
Is there an option to purchase a recording in case people are unable to take the day off work?
we don't have such option yet, but you can join as a virtual attendee. All recordings will be available post event for everyone who registered
What if someone bought the virtual option and wanted to swap to in person, can they pay the difference?
If I buy virtual ticket now, can I switch to in-person later paying the delta? I’m not from US but I hope to travel to SF for work around the summit week, if I can lineup stars.

@MindFlayer @paytun – we can figure that out. Eventbrite doesn't provide such feature out of the box. We had to create two different Eventbrite pages for that reason. 

one option - get virtual now, if you decide to switch – you can help to process the refund for the Virtual one and you can purchase the In-person ticket. *actually the reverse will be better – buy in-person now, if anyting comes up – switch to virtual. Having an in-person ticket now will lock down Early Bird Discounted price and you can pick the T-shirt size*
Ok awesome, thank you @Zhanat... bought virtural for now, but if it can work out would be nice to be in person and meet everyone
@Zhanat bought the virtual ticket now and few folks from my company will buy too. Will it be too complicated to add option to buy tshirt for virtual attendees?

let me see what options we have for T-shirts for virtual attendees. I am pretty sure we can come up with something!

btw, your folks can still buy discounted tickets at Early Bird price by EOD PT today !
I would love to have one, and I'll join virtually.
Hey man, missed few sessions at the end due to work. Do you know when the recording & presentation materials will be shared?

Hi 👋 

We are rolling through the raw footage, which is basically one file with 6+ hours of video!

Please give us an additional week while we slice and format the videos 🙏

Cross posting for viz!

We kicked off a feedback survey for TPM Summit 2023: 
https://discord.com/channels/853099205206999050/1137169489822224404/1171133469003358338
